    qat.4: Minor tweaks

    - Document a constraint on the AAD size for AES-GCM.
    - Note that the list of supported platforms and add-on devices is not
      complete and indicate that QAT devices will show up in pciconf
      output. [1]

    PR:             252984 [1]
